name: Melf's Acid Arrow
components: M (powdered rhubarb leaf and an adder's stomach)
description: A shimmering green arrow streaks toward a target within range and bursts in a spray of acid. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 4d4 Acid damage immediately and 2d4 Acid damage at the end of its next turn. On a miss, the arrow splashes the target with acid for half as much of the initial damage only. When using a higher-level spell slot, the initial damage increases by 1d4 for each slot level above 2.
